articles.title: Live updates: Aftermath of deadly Midwest tornadoes as severe storm threat shifts east today - FOX Weather
articles.description: Recovery is underway in Lake Village, Indiana, and Kankakee, Illinois, after destructive tornadoes leveled homes, killing two people and injuring several others Tuesday night. We are tracking the storm system as it moves east today, bringing a threat of damag…
articles.content: Officials provided updates on recovery efforts in Lake Village, Indiana, of the hardest hit areas from Tuesdays severe weather outbreak, where two people died after a damaging tornado moved through t… [+1322 chars]
